name: Classic Five-Point Star
subject: nature/star
prompt: a single bold five-pointed star centered on the page, perfectly symmetrical with clean straight edges and an open middle, large and simple for easy coloring

name: Smiling Cute Star
subject: nature/star
prompt: a chubby cartoon star with a happy smiling face, two big round sparkly eyes, rosy cheeks, tiny waving arms and little feet at the bottom points, looking cheerful and friendly

name: Wishing Shooting Star
subject: nature/star
prompt: a shooting star streaking across the sky with a long curved sparkly trail flowing behind it, small swirls and tiny dots in the tail, a few little stars scattered around

name: Starburst Pattern
subject: nature/star
prompt: an intricate circular mandala built from layered star shapes, repeating five-pointed stars radiating from the center outward, decorative dots, petals, and swirling patterns filling each ring

name: Starry Night Sky Scene
subject: nature/star
prompt: a peaceful night sky scene with a smiling crescent moon and many twinkling stars of different sizes scattered across it, a few wispy clouds and rolling hilltops along the bottom

name: Star Cluster Bunch
subject: nature/star
prompt: a cheerful cluster of many five-pointed stars grouped together at different sizes and angles, some overlapping, a few tiny sparkle dots tucked between them, filling the page

name: Big Star Close-Up
subject: nature/star
prompt: a single large detailed star filling most of the page, each of its five points divided into facets and sections with line patterns, a small decorative star design in the center

name: Twinkling Sparkle Star
subject: nature/star
prompt: a glittering four-point sparkle star with long thin radiating beams of light, small bursts and tiny dot sparkles surrounding it, a bright shining magical look

name: Star and Crescent Moon
subject: nature/star
prompt: a friendly crescent moon with a single bright five-pointed star nestled in its curve, both with gentle smiling faces, a few small sparkles drifting around them

name: Easy Toddler Star
subject: nature/star
prompt: one very large chunky five-pointed star with thick rounded outlines and a wide open middle, extra simple and bold, perfect for the smallest hands to color inside

name: Star Constellation Map
subject: nature/star
prompt: a connect-the-stars constellation scene with several small stars joined by straight dotted lines forming simple shapes like a bear and a dipper, set against an open sky with a few scattered stars

name: Wreath of Stars
subject: nature/star
prompt: a circular wreath made of many five-pointed stars linked together in a ring, small leaves and dots woven between the stars, an open center and a little bow at the top
